## 🏆 Stellar Wave Task Proposal

This issue tracks a specific point-weighted task as part of the Stellar Drips Wave program.

### 📊 Task Metadata
- **Technical Domain:** [e.g. Smart Contracts / SDK / Frontend / Documentation]
- **Complexity Tier:** [Trivial (100 pts) / Medium (150 pts) / High (200 pts)]
- **Est. Point Value:** [100 / 150 / 200] points

### 📝 Problem Description
A clear and concise description of what needs to be implemented or fixed.

### 🎯 Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Feature/bug is fully implemented and conforms to standard specifications.
- [ ] Core business logic passes SoroGuard scan (for contracts).
- [ ] Unit tests cover all key edge cases (happy path, error cases, bounds).
- [ ] Documentation updated to reflect changes.
- [ ] CI pipeline runs and passes completely.
